assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Explicitly addresses control plane compatibility with detailed commands to check Istio compatibility with K8s 1.32 and includes compatibility matrix reference

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Specifically includes checking the Istio release notes for 1.32 compatibility matrix and provides direct link to compatibility documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Before touching GKE, ensure your service mesh can handle the new Kubernetes version' and provides upgrade commands if Istio upgrade is needed

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands to check admission webhooks, describes webhook certificate issues as a common pitfall, and provides validation steps for sidecar injection

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands to check sidecar versions across all pods and includes test injection validation for new pods

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly lists 'Envoy Proxy Version Skew' as a pitfall and provides commands to monitor all sidecar versions for consistency

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Provides multiple istioctl commands including 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl version', and kubectl commands for checking proxy versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions 'Mixed proxy versions causing connection issues' as a symptom of version skew and explains the importance of version consistency for mesh connectivity
